Select up to 6 points within range. Falling flames fall into these spaces and detonate, filling a 10-ft radius sphere with unimaginable heat. Creatures in affected areas make a Con save, taking 4d6+4 fire, gaining 2 ranks of Burned, and Off-Guard on failure.

Off-Guard. Off-Guard creatures cannot spend their reaction in response to this jutsu's casting or damage.

jutsu.name: Genjutsu: Ephemera
jutsu.description:
Requires active Sharingan. You place a target under a torture illusion if they refuse your command. Give them a 1-word command achievable in 6 seconds; if it would harm them, this jutsu ends. If they submit they perform and repeat the action for the duration, forgetting they completed it.

If they resist, Wis save:
Success: jutsu ends, target resists.
Failure: Torturous visions begin. Each turn not completing your request, take 5d10 psychic and become Confused for the duration. Save at end of each turn ends.
Critical Failure: same as failure but damage becomes 5d12.

jutsu.name: Uchiha Flame Spiral
jutsu.description:
The ultimate Uchiha Fire Release. Conjure three flaming tornadoes — each a 5-ft wide, 30-ft tall column centered on a point. Creatures within the tornado area on cast and whose space they pass through make a Dex save, taking 5d12+5 Fire, 2 ranks Burned, -15 ft speed until end of next turn on failure, or half on success.

As a Bonus Action each of your turns, command each tornado separately, moving them up to 30 ft, ending on a point. A creature cannot be forced to save more than once per turn.

Tornadoes have 40 HP, AC 10. At 0 HP they explode dealing 4d12+4 fire to all creatures within 10 ft.

Off-Guard. Off-Guard creatures make saves at disadvantage.

jutsu.name: Uzumaki Art: Ablative Seal
jutsu.description:
Inscribe a Chakra seal onto a willing creature's armor / clothing. For the duration, target gains 4 Temporary HP at the start of each of their turns.

Seal Break. If a creature within 30 ft has ranks of Sealed, dispel one rank to also grant 6 Temporary Chakra points as part of casting.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and Temp HP by +2.

jutsu.name: Uzumaki Art: Basic Seal
jutsu.description:
Inscribe a Chakra seal onto your palm and create a three-point seal. Make a melee Ninjutsu attack, dealing 4d6 chakra damage and forcing a Cha save, gaining a rank of Sealed on failure.

Seal Break. If a creature within 30 ft has ranks of Sealed, dispel one rank to change range to Self (15-Cube), comparing your attack result to all creatures in the affected area.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6. If cast at B-Rank or higher, increase ranks of Sealed by +1. If cast at S-Rank, +2.

jutsu.name: Uzumaki Art: Font of Life
jutsu.description: Sacrifice your blood, Chakra and essence to mend an ally's injuries. A willing creature other than yourself may bite you. You can spend any number of your remaining chakra dice, recording the result. For each Chakra die spent, the target regains HP equal to the result.

jutsu.name: Uzumaki Art: Flash Anchor
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you would take damage or make a saving throw
jutsu.description:
Quickly deploy Chakra seals to create an immovable defensive barrier. Until end of current turn, gain a rank of Mastery to AC and saves against the triggering and subsequent effects. Cannot be moved or teleported against your will.

Seal Break. If a creature within 30 ft has ranks of Sealed, dispel one rank to extend duration to start of your next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If cast at B-Rank, bonus becomes 2 ranks of Mastery. If cast at S-Rank, 3 ranks.

jutsu.name: Uzumaki Art: Chakra Suppression
jutsu.description:
Quickly deploy a suppressive seal at a point you can see within range. It lands on the chosen point, radiating 10-ft aura. For the duration, creatures that begin / end / enter their turn in the aura make a Cha save, being unable to cast jutsu of a rank equal to this jutsu when it was cast.

Seal Break. If a hostile creature within the radius has ranks of Sealed, dispel one rank to increase the size by +5 ft.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3.

jutsu.name: Adamantine Barrier
jutsu.description:
Weave a net creating an impregnable barrier using adamantine sealing chains. Forms into a 15-ft radius sphere at a point within range (free floating or resting). Lasts for the duration.

If the wall cuts through a creature's space when it appears, push them to a side of your choice. If a hostile attempts to move through or target a creature inside without the caster's permission, Cha save — failure: cannot move through or target inside for the remainder of the turn and must choose new valid target. Area-effect jutsu penetrate through.

Seal Break. If a creature within 30 ft has ranks of Sealed, dispel one rank to grant temporary HP equal to rank (D 10, C 16, B 22, A 28, S 34). Damage to creatures inside hits the barrier first; if reduced to 0, remaining damage applies to intended targets.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3.

jutsu.name: Uzumaki Art: Red Hot-Blooded Vitality
jutsu.description:
Tap into the hot-blooded Uzumaki nature — hair floats, eyes glow, chakra undulates. For the duration:
  • Gain a rank of Mastery to all Strength, Dexterity and Constitution Skill and Ability checks.
  • Advantage on Concentration checks.

jutsu.name: Uzumaki Art: 5-Pronged Seal
jutsu.description:
Advanced Basic Seal — two seals layered, reinforced with a 5-point seal of your design, to lock away Chakra for powerful creatures. Make a melee Ninjutsu attack. On a hit, the target is infused with the 5-Pronged Seal condition.

Seal Break. If a creature within 30 ft has ranks of Sealed, dispel one rank to cast another jutsu (1-Action casting time) as a Bonus Action against the same target.

jutsu.name: Uzumaki Break
jutsu.description:
Using your knowledge of seals and Fuinjutsu, surgically dismantle jutsu within range that are currently maintained or active. Select a point within range; make a Ninshou skill check vs the Jutsu save DC of all jutsu-based effects within a 5-ft radius.

On success, you understand the inner workings of all active Ninjutsu / Genjutsu in the area — rank, effects, direction of caster. Additionally, up to 2 jutsu of your choice whose rank is lower than this jutsu is dispelled, and creatures in area make a Cha save. On failure, they cannot gain jutsu-based bonuses or healing until your next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3.

jutsu.name: Uzumaki Art: River Dam Seal
jutsu.description: Target must have at least 5 ranks of Sealed. You draw an infamous seal manifesting as a glowing sigil, sharing your space before shrinking into a 1-kanji seal saying or meaning anything you describe. Make a melee Ninjutsu attack. On a hit, the seal envelops them marking their whole body with the River Dam Seal condition.

jutsu.name: Psycho Mind Flux
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Tactile, Auditory, Unaware), Fuinjutsu
jutsu.description:
You cause a psychotic break in the mind of your foe. Select a creature within range; Cha save.

Critical Success: No further effects.
Success: 2d6 psychic damage.
Failure: Target must take the Attack or Multiattack action targeting one of its allies within attack range, gaining 1 Mental Overwrite.
Critical Failure: Same as failure but target moves up to their speed toward the closest ally, ending adjacent or as close as possible before attacking.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If cast at B-Rank or higher, increase targets by +1. If cast at S-Rank, +1 more.

jutsu.name: Bestial Mind Domination
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Tactile, Auditory, Unaware), Fuinjutsu
jutsu.description:
Lesser version of Mind Body Transfer for creatures with less mental fortitude than humans. Select a single creature within range; Int save.

Critical Success: No further effects.
Success: Attitude becomes Indifferent until end of next turn — blank memories of meeting you and allies for a moment.
Failure: Attitude becomes Friendly for 1 minute unless you or allies perform a hostile action.
Critical Failure: Attitude becomes Helpful — will fight for you if asked, can be commanded verbally or non-verbally. You can understand their emotions.

jutsu.name: Mind Body Disturbance
jutsu.description:
Modified Mind Body Transfer on a humanoid creature within range. Target makes a Cha save.

Critical Success: No further effects.
Success: 2d8 psychic damage.
Failure: 4d8 psychic damage and 1 Mental Overwrite.
Critical Failure: 5d8 psychic damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d8. At B-Rank or higher, increase Mental Overwrite by +1. At S-Rank, +1 more.

jutsu.name: Mental Dance Performance
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Tactile, Auditory, Unaware), Fuinjutsu
jutsu.description:
Release a pulse of intent filling an area with mental suggestion to dance erratically. Select a point within range; all creatures in a 15-ft cube make a Wis save.

Critical Success: No further effects.
Success: Confused until end of next turn.
Failure: Begin to dance / move erratically (non-hostile). Must use all movement to perform, disadvantage on ranged attacks. Save at end of each turn ends — successful save grants 1 Mental Overwrite.
Critical Failure: Same as failure but must also spend Bonus action.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If cast at B-Rank, increase range to 60 ft (15-ft cube). If cast at S-Rank, increase cube size to 30 ft.

jutsu.name: Mind Clone Technique
jutsu.description: Split your consciousness into two identical clones, projecting them onto enemies. When two or more creatures would have enough Mental Overwrite ranks to be Dominated, cast this jutsu to apply Dominated to both, following its rules.

jutsu.name: Mind Body Augmentation
jutsu.description: Enhance the mental receptors of a willing creature you can touch. Pick one of Int / Wis / Cha. For the duration, the target gains proficiency in that save. If they already have proficiency, gain rank of Mastery instead.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3. At A-Rank, +1 additional creature.

jutsu.name: Mass Mind Body Dance
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Tactile, Auditory, Unaware), Fuinjutsu
jutsu.description:
Issue a command influencing up to 6 creatures within range that can see and hear you. Command cannot be to harm themselves. Each target makes a Cha save. Creatures that cannot be Compelled are immune.

Critical Success: No further effects.
Success: Slowed until end of next turn.
Failure: Pursue the command as an Action each turn for the duration. Save at end of each turn ends; if they take damage, jutsu ends on them and they gain 1 Mental Overwrite.
Critical Failure: Same as failure but damage only allows remake.

jutsu.name: Mass Mind Body Disjunction
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Tactile, Auditory, Unaware), Fuinjutsu
jutsu.description:
Emit a wave of psychic chakra resetting connection of mind and body. All creatures of your choice within 30 ft make a Cha save.

If a hostile is Shadow Bound by an ally or target of an ally's Human Boulder jutsu, this jutsu's casting time becomes 1 Reaction in response. The bound or target creature treats their result as one degree worse.

Critical Success: 2d6 psychic damage.
Success: 4d6 psychic + Dazed.
Failure: 8d6 psychic + Slowed + 1 Mental Overwrite.
Critical Failure: 10d6 psychic + Stunned + 3 Mental Overwrite.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Mind Puppet Switch: Cursed Seal
jutsu.description:
Take a puppet, doll, or humanoid-shaped item no smaller than an average child's toy. Place a secret Yamanaka sealing jutsu on it. Target must have 5 ranks of Mental Overwrite or 7 combined ranks of [Mental] conditions.

Once cast, target makes a Cha save vs your highest jutsu save DC.

Critical Success: No further effect, 24-hour immunity.
Success: Resists consciousness snatch but Confused until end of next turn.
Failure: Consciousness bound inside the item. Body Incapacitated until consciousness returns. Bound creature remakes save once per 10 minutes. If item destroyed, consciousness re-enters body if alive; if dead, wanders binding to another body or item. Successful save grants 24-hour immunity.
Critical Failure: Same as failure but remake only once per 24 hours.

jutsu.name: Typhoon Release: Jettison
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage from an attack
jutsu.description: You release an explosion of wind, protecting yourself with a burst of air. Until the start of your next turn, you have a +4 bonus to AC. Creatures within the affected area when cast must succeed a Strength save, taking 2d6 wind damage and being pushed to the edge of the area on a failure.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the area by 5 ft.

jutsu.name: Typhoon Release: Soaring Wind Veil
jutsu.description:
You create a vortex of ferocious wind — 15-ft radius, 60-ft high cylinder centered on you. When a creature other than you enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, they are pushed by pressure and must make a Strength save. Creatures inside are heavily obscured from those outside and vice versa.

The below results are only used if you are in your Pressure Front chakra stance.
Critical Success: Affected creatures take half of 3d6 wind damage.
Success: Affected creatures take half of 3d6 wind damage and become Bruised.
Failure: Affected creatures take 3d6 wind damage, are Bruised and pushed back 10 ft.
Critical Failure: Same as failure but take 5d6 wind damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d6. If cast at B-Rank or higher, you can see through the obstruction. If cast at S-Rank, ranged attacks targeting you have damage reduced by 3d6 and this jutsu gains the Barrier keyword.

jutsu.name: Typhoon Release: Storm Geyser
jutsu.description:
You conjure a blast of wind that launches upwards from under a creature within range. Target makes a Dexterity save, taking 2d8 wind damage and being knocked up 30 ft, falling prone on failure or half damage and no further effects on success.

The below results are only used if you are in your Pressure Front chakra stance.
Critical Success: Affected creatures take half of 2d8 wind damage.
Success: Affected creatures take half of 2d8 wind damage and are Shaken until end of next turn.
Failure: Affected creatures take 2d8 wind damage, are Shaken and thrown 30 ft into a space of your choice, falling Prone.
Critical Failure: Same as failure but take 4d8 wind damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3, the number of targets by +1 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Typhoon Release: Tempest Step
jutsu.description: Coalesce a powerful gust of wind at your feet for a burst of quick movement. Choose an unoccupied space within 30 ft in any direction, including up. Each creature you pass within 5 ft of during this movement must make a Dexterity save, being knocked Prone on failure. This movement does not provoke opportunity attacks.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the distance by +5 ft. If cast at B-Rank or higher, after your first movement, select a second space and repeat. A creature can only be affected once per casting. If cast at S-Rank, after your second movement, select a third space and repeat.

jutsu.name: Typhoon Release: Vacuum Collapse
jutsu.description:
Coat your hand in wind chakra before releasing it as a disrupting pulse. Make a melee Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack, dealing 4d10 wind damage on a hit. On a hit, the target makes a Constitution save, becoming Weakened on failure as air is forced from their lungs.

The below results are only used if you are in your Pressure Front chakra stance.
Critical Success: Affected creatures resist this jutsu's effects.
Success: Affected creatures gain 1 rank of Weakened until end of next turn.
Failure: Affected creatures gain 1 rank of Weakened.
Critical Failure: Affected creatures gain 2 ranks of Weakened.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and ranks of Weakened by +1.

jutsu.name: Typhoon Release: Vicious Vortex
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Auditory, Tactile), Wind Release
jutsu.description:
Unleash a rotating force of wind that drags everything to its center. Select a point you can see within range; creatures in a 15-ft radius make a Strength save. On failure, take 5d6 wind damage, pulled 10 ft closer and Prone; half on success. Structures and objects treat damage as if vulnerable.

The below results are only used if you are in your Pressure Front chakra stance.
Critical Success: Affected creatures take half of 5d6 wind damage.
Success: Affected creatures take half of 5d6 wind damage and are Dazzled until end of next turn.
Failure: Affected creatures take 5d6 wind damage and gain 1 rank of Dazzled. Structures and objects treat damage as if vulnerable.
Critical Failure: Same as failure but take 7d6 wind damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3, the damage by 1d6 and radius by 5 ft.

jutsu.name: Typhoon Release: Wind Serpent's Maw
jutsu.description:
Create a maw of wind that roars pushing back all in its path. Creatures in range make a Strength save, being pushed 30 ft, taking 4d8 wind damage and suffering 1 rank of Bleed on failure. Half on success. If knocked-back creatures collide with a solid object, they stop and take damage as if they had fallen an equal distance.

The below results are only used if you are in your Pressure Front chakra stance.
Critical Success: Affected creatures take half of 4d8 wind damage.
Success: Affected creatures take half of 4d8 wind damage and are Shaken until end of next turn.
Failure: Affected creatures take 4d8 wind damage, are pushed back 30 ft and gain 1 rank of Bleed. Collision damage as above.
Critical Failure: Same as failure but take 6d8 wind damage and gain 2 ranks of Bleed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d8. If cast at A-Rank or higher, creatures can spend their reaction to plant themselves; if they don't, they make their save with a -2 penalty.

jutsu.name: Typhoon Release: Storm Bastion
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you or an allied creature in range takes damage
jutsu.description:
Manifest a spiraling helix of hardened air streams around the protected target. Barrier has 2d8 + 10 HP and 2 DR, lasts until your next turn.

If the Barrier's HP are reduced to 0, all creatures within 10 ft of the protected creature (excluding you) make a Strength save — pushed 20 ft and Dazed on failure.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and barrier HP by 1d8+4.

jutsu.name: Typhoon Release: Whirlwind Bomb
jutsu.description:
Condense a rampaging ball of wind, then throw it to explode. Make a ranged Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack. On hit, target takes 8d6 wind damage. Hit or miss, each creature within 15 ft of the target (excluding original target) makes a Constitution save or takes 4d6 wind damage and becomes Dazed.

The below results are only used if you are in your Pressure Front chakra stance.
Critical Success: Affected creatures take half of 4d6 wind damage.
Success: Affected creatures take half of 4d6 wind damage and are Dazzled.
Failure: Affected creatures take 4d6 wind damage and are Dazed.
Critical Failure: Affected creatures take the same damage as the original target and are Dazed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Typhoon Release: High Wind Destruction
jutsu.description:
Create a powerful swirling area of wind that prevents creatures from acting against your will. Select a point you can see within range; choose up to 6 creatures and yourself to be unaffected by the adverse effects.

When a creature enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, they are pushed to the ground by wind and make a Strength save, being knocked Prone, Blinded and Deafened until next turn on failure. On success, treat as difficult terrain. Flying creatures save at disadvantage.

Creatures that begin their turns inside the radius are heavily obscured from creatures outside and vice versa, and must remake the save against this jutsu's effects.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the radius by +5 ft.

jutsu.name: Typhoon Release: Severe Wind Destruction
jutsu.description:
Create a spiraling pillar of wind centered on yourself — 45-ft radius, 150-ft high. This cylinder becomes difficult terrain for every creature other than you (even flying). Unattended large-or-smaller objects in the cylinder are pulled upward and spin around the center at 200 mph.

A creature that starts its turn in the cylinder makes a Strength save or is pulled upward and restrained while in motion. All objects and creatures inside take 6d12 wind damage at the start of each of your turns.

Save at the start of each turn to avoid being restrained for that turn. If a creature or object other than you is in the radius for 3 consecutive turns, they are flung out after rising to the cylinder's height, taking falling damage and being knocked prone.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above A-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 2d12.

jutsu.name: Hanami Style: Sapping Fist
jutsu.description:
Coat your hands in medical chakra designed to sap life force. Once per turn, when you deal [Unarmed Damage], gain Temporary HP equal to the damage dealt.

Monstrous Burst. For the duration, your [Unarmed Damage] can be necrotic. When you make an unarmed attack, if you roll 5 or 6 on the die, add 1d6 damage. Up to 4 times per turn.

Healer's Touch. For the duration, when you deal [Unarmed Damage], select one willing creature within 10 ft — they gain Temp HP equal to the damage dealt.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If cast at B-Rank or higher, also regain HP equal to [Unarmed Damage] dealt. If cast at S-Rank, gain Temp HP twice per turn. Temp HP stacks with itself.

jutsu.name: Hanami Style: Sapping Strike
jutsu.description:
Your hands glow pink as you get ready to devastate. Make a melee Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack, dealing [Unarmed Damage] + 2d8 Necrotic and regain HP equal to half damage dealt.

Finisher: Make a second attack against the same creature, dealing [Unarmed Damage] + 2d8 chakra damage. Gain Temp Chakra equal to half the d8 damage die result.

Monstrous Burst. On a hit, target makes Con save — Bruised on failure.

Healer's Touch. On a hit, target makes Con save — on failure, any Physical condition you have ranks of: reduce its ranks by 1 and the affected creature gains 1 rank of the same condition.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d8. If cast at A-Rank or higher, you regain HP equal to total damage dealt.

jutsu.name: Hanami Style: Blooming Cherry Blossom
jutsu.description:
Rush a target before unleashing a volley of attacks. Make two melee Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attacks, dealing [Unarmed Damage] + 1d6 each. If you hit twice or more, target is knocked Prone.

Monstrous Burst. Attacks made with +1 to critical threat range.

Healer's Touch. Next jutsu you cast that restores HP, target regains 1d6 additional HP.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3, damage by 1d6 and healing by 1d6. If cast at B-Rank or higher, increase attacks by +1. If cast at S-Rank, increase attacks by +1.

jutsu.name: Hanami Style: Lasting Healing
jutsu.description: Cover your hands in chakra glowing pink. A creature you touch regains 2d6 HP. Additionally, at the start of each of the affected creature's turns, they regain 1d6 HP.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and initial healing by 1d6. If cast at B-Rank or higher, increase per-turn healing by +1d6. If cast at S-Rank, increase per-turn healing by +1d6.

jutsu.name: Hanami Style: Foxglove Petals
jutsu.description:
Take powdered foxglove petals infused with medical chakra and release them into a controlled cloud of delirium and nausea. Select a point you can see within range; fill a 10-ft cube with hallucinogenic petals. All creatures in range make a Constitution save.

Success: Affected creature resists this jutsu's effects.
Failure: Affected creature gains 1 rank of Envenomed and is Confused.
Critical Failure: Same as failure but also Berserked while Envenomed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and range by +10 ft. If cast at B-Rank or higher, increase cube by +5 ft. If cast at S-Rank, increase cube by +5 ft.

jutsu.name: Hanami Style: Healing Cloak
jutsu.description:
Cover your body in soothing medical chakra, glowing soft pink. On cast, regain 3d8 HP. For the duration, each time you take damage, gain 1 Hanami Resilience. At the start of your turn, regain 1d8 HP per Hanami Resilience, then set to 0.

Monstrous Burst. For the duration, each time you score 2+ melee attacks in the same turn, also gain 1 Hanami Resilience.

Healer's Touch. Select a damage type. For the duration, once per turn, each time you take damage of the chosen type, gain 2 Hanami Resilience.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6. If cast at A-Rank or higher, gain Temp HP equal to total damage dealt instead.

jutsu.name: Hanami Style: Colossal Impact
jutsu.description:
Drive your fist into a creature's stomach to lift them, then slam them into the ground with massive force. Make a melee Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack — on hit, deal [Unarmed Damage] + 4d6. Each creature (excluding you + original target) within 20 ft makes a Dex save, taking 4d6 bludgeoning on failure or half on success.

Finisher: Original target makes a Constitution save, being Staggered and Bruised on failure.

Monstrous Burst. Creatures within 5 ft of you when cast make their save at disadvantage.

Healer's Touch. Allied creatures in range are unaffected by the shockwave; instead gain Temp HP equal to half AoE damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Hanami Style: Defensive Cloak
jutsu.description:
Cover your body in a vile cloak of medical jutsu that harms any who touch you. When a creature hits you with a melee attack, they take 2d6 Necrotic damage and you gain Temp HP equal to half the Necrotic dealt. Triggers twice per turn.

Monstrous Burst. For the duration, each melee hit splashes the vile chakra onto all creatures of your choice within 10 ft.

Healer's Touch. For the duration, when an ally within 10 ft takes damage from a melee attack, this jutsu triggers, affecting the attacker.

jutsu.name: Hanami Style: Offensive Cloak
jutsu.description:
Cover your body in a bolstering cloak of medical jutsu. Deal 2d8 bonus poison or necrotic damage (your choice on cast) when you deal [Unarmed Damage] as an attack. Once per turn, affected creature makes a Constitution save or cannot regain HP until end of next turn.

Monstrous Burst. For the duration, your unarmed attacks gain Pierce 6.

Healer's Touch. If an affected creature that failed the save would regain HP before end of next turn, you regain equal amount.

jutsu.name: Hanami Style: Cherry Blossom Finale
jutsu.description:
Slam your fist into the ground creating a giant shockwave. Creatures in range make a Dexterity save, taking [Unarmed Damage] + 4d8 on failure or half on success. Prone creatures save at disadvantage. After this jutsu, the area is difficult terrain.

Finisher: Between jagged rocks is a plume of poisonous mist. Creatures that failed gain 2 ranks of Envenomed and are Bruised while envenomed.

Monstrous Burst. Increase cone to 60 ft; creatures within 10 ft of you when cast save with -2.

Healer's Touch. Alert allied creatures in range — willing allies of your choice are harmlessly thrown to the end of the area and do not suffer this jutsu's effects.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Hanami Style: Falling Blossom Reprise
jutsu.description:
You must be under the effects of your Medical Fist stance, Hanami Style: Defensive Cloak AND Offensive Cloak. End concentration on both Cloaks; cannot concentrate on another Hanami Hijutsu while active. While under this jutsu:
  • Melee hits against you deal 2d12 Necrotic to attacker and you regain equal HP.
  • Your [Unarmed Damage] becomes 3d6 and can be poison or necrotic; damaged creatures cannot regain HP until end of next turn.
  • Crit on Medical or Taijutsu attack triples your unarmed damage die.

At conclusion, you cannot mold chakra until you complete a rest.

jutsu.name: Magnet Release: Dust Arm
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Fuinjutsu, Earth Release, Wind Release, Stable
jutsu.description:
Form a pair of large arms from dust particles in two different spaces within range you can see. They must be in contact with solid ground. As part of casting and as a Bonus Action on subsequent turns, command each arm to make a melee Ninjutsu attack against creatures within 10 ft of it. On hit, deal 4d6 earth damage and force a Dex save, being Grappled by the arm on failure. Grappled creatures save at end of each turn to escape.

Additionally, as a Bonus Action to command an Arm, you can move it up to 30 ft to a new space.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and arms' damage by 1d6. If cast at B-Rank or higher, increase arms by +1. If cast at S-Rank, increase arms by +1.

jutsu.name: Magnet Release: Dust Coat
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Earth Release, Wind Release, Barrier, Stable, Efficient
jutsu.description:
Draw dust particles around yourself to create invisible armor. For the duration, you gain:
  • +2 to AC.
  • +2 to DR.
  • At the start of each of your turns, generate a Barrier with 8 HP. If you would gain a different Barrier, choose which one to use.

This jutsu ends if you don Heavy armor or you end it as a Bonus Action.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If cast at C-Rank or higher, increase Barrier HP by +2. If cast at B-Rank or higher, increase AC and DR bonus by +1. If cast at A-Rank or higher, duration becomes 1 Hour. If cast at S-Rank, increase AC and DR by +1 again.

jutsu.name: Magnet Release: Dust Particle Drizzle
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Inhale, Tactile), Earth Release, Wind Release
jutsu.description:
Form a mass of dust particles, firing a wave of dust bullets. Creatures of your choice in a 30-ft cone make a Dexterity save.

Critical Success: Half of 1d12 Earth + 1d12 Piercing damage.
Success: Half damage and Dazzled until end of next turn.
Failure: 1d12 Earth + 1d12 Piercing damage; Sealed and Bruised.
Critical Failure: Same as failure but doubled damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and both damage types by 1d12. If cast at C-Rank or higher, increase ranks of Sealed by +1. If cast at B-Rank or higher, increase cone by +10 ft. If cast at A-Rank or higher, increase ranks of Dazzled by +1. If cast at S-Rank, increase cone by +10 ft.

jutsu.name: Magnet Release: Dust Shield
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Action or 1 Reaction, which you take when you or an allied creature would take damage
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Earth Release, Wind Release, Barrier
jutsu.description:
Draw dust particles to create a Barrier of any design.

As an Action — manifest the dust shield around yourself or another willing creature. If they move, the jutsu ends. While active, they gain a Barrier with 18 HP, ends when they move or barrier reaches 0 HP.

As a Reaction (to damage) — grant the damaged creature a Barrier with 12 HP, lasts until their next turn.

The Barrier has resistance to Cold and Earth, vulnerability to Lightning.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and Dust Shield HP by 8. When cast at B-Rank or higher, affected creature cannot be moved against their will while protected.

jutsu.name: Magnet Release: Magnetic Polarization
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Earth Release, Wind Release
jutsu.description: Focus your magnetic chakra on a point within range — your chakra expands to fill a 10-ft cube, magnetizing objects and creatures within when cast. Creatures in range make a Constitution save. On failure, for the duration, the first weapon attack each turn against the target has advantage and they gain a rank of Sealed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and cube size by +5 ft.

jutsu.name: Magnet Release: Dust Shuriken Storm
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Bukijutsu, Earth Release, Wind Release
jutsu.description: Form spinning discs of dust, launched rapidly with additional volleys possible. Make a ranged Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack against a creature in range, dealing 2d10 slashing + 2d10 earth damage. Spend additional 4 chakra to make another attack against a different creature. Repeat up to three times. Crit refunds the chakra cost.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If cast at B-Rank or higher, target same creature with one additional attack. If cast at A-Rank or higher, increase damage by 1d10 each type. If cast at S-Rank, choose up to 4 creatures and compare attack result to each AC.

jutsu.name: Magnet Release: Dust Mesh
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Earth Release, Wind Release, Stable, Efficient
jutsu.description: Create an expanding mesh of dust in the shape of a tightly knit web. Select a point you can see within range; fill a 20-ft cube with this support web. Creatures of your choice in the area are immune to environmental hazards, difficult terrain, and can walk across the area even if it's over a deep ravine.

jutsu.name: Magnet Release: Concealed Sand Cat
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Fuinjutsu, Earth Release, Wind Release, Sensory
jutsu.description: Select a point you can see within range; disperse chakra-infused dust in the area. Creatures moving within reveal themselves. Invisible creatures are covered in dust, becoming visible to all creatures within the area.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and cube by +10 ft. If cast at A-Rank, duration becomes 1 Hour.

jutsu.name: Magnet Release: Dust World Order
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Inhale, Tactile), Earth Release, Wind Release
jutsu.description:
Collect Dust particles into a single point in the air, creating a magnificent structure of geometric branching spikes that shoot randomly in every direction. All creatures in the area make a Dexterity save.

Critical Success: Half of 6d6 earth damage.
Success: Half damage and Staggered.
Failure: 6d6 earth damage; Dazed and Staggered.
Critical Failure: Same as failure but 8d6 earth damage and Stunned.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and area by +10 ft.

jutsu.name: Magnet Release: Gathering Assault
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Fuinjutsu, Earth Release, Wind Release
jutsu.description:
Gather dust particles into a high-density shape, then launch it. Select a creature or space within range; drop this massive structure on it.

Against a creature — make a ranged Ninjutsu attack, dealing 8d10 earth damage and landing on top.

Against a space — the space is destroyed; if surface < 5 ft thick, ground collapses and the structure falls to the next surface in a 15×20 ft space. All creatures within 40 ft of the structure when it lands make a Strength save if wielding a metallic weapon. On failure, the weapon is drawn to the structure and merged in for the duration. If a creature hit by the attack fails the Str save to retain their weapon, they are also Restrained under the structure. Restrained save end of each turn to escape.

Structure remains solid for the duration. Weapons fall harmlessly into a holding space when the jutsu ends.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3, damage by 1d10, and number of structures/attacks by +1.

jutsu.name: Magnet Release: Imperial Dust Funeral
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Earth Release, Wind Release
jutsu.description:
Summon a wall of dust particles, washing it out in a 60-ft cone. All creatures in range make a Strength save, taking 4d8 earth damage and being Restrained, Weakened, Bruised and pushed to the end of the area on failure.

Creatures Grappled or Restrained by a Jiton clan Hijutsu or feature automatically fail their save and treat damage as if vulnerable.

Once cast, you cannot cast it again until the end of your following turn.

jutsu.name: Magnet Release: Dust Particle World
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Earth Release, Wind Release
jutsu.description:
Create two masses of dust particles of opposing magnetic fields, merge them, and repel the particles across a 40-ft radius sphere centered on a point you choose within range. The area is difficult terrain. Creatures see through the area at disadvantage on Perception checks. Creatures of your choice that enter the area for the first time on a turn or start their turn there make a Constitution save, taking 4d8 piercing + 4d8 earth on failure, Restrained for the duration, 2 ranks of Sealed; half damage on success.

A creature Grappled or Restrained by a Jiton clan Hijutsu/feature that failed becomes Stunned until end of next turn.

jutsu.name: Steel Release: Impervious Armor
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage
jutsu.description:
Quickly turn your skin into a steel-like material. For the duration, gain resistance to the triggering damage type unless it's Lightning.

Alomancy Infusion. If you have Iron Bulwark, spend 1 Ingot to cast as a reaction to an ally within 30 ft taking damage, applying this jutsu's effect to the target in addition to Iron Bulwark.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If cast at C-Rank or higher, you can cast this if you would make a Strength or Constitution save, gaining advantage on the triggering save.

jutsu.name: Steel Release: Steel Projectile
jutsu.description:
Create an object made of steel and launch it at high speed. Make a ranged Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack, dealing 3d10 piercing, slashing or bludgeoning (your choice) and reducing their next save result by 1d4.

Alomancy Infusion. If you have Metallic Thorns, spend 1 Ingot per attack to scatter the metallic shrapnel, filling a 5-ft radius around the target with the Metallic Thorns effect.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If cast at B-Rank or higher, increase attacks by +1. If cast at S-Rank, increase attacks by +1. Save reduction does not stack.

jutsu.name: Steel Release: Steel Telekinesis
jutsu.description:
Command Steel from long ranges. Lift Medium-size-or-lower objects of/connected-to steel, even armor-wearing creatures. Select 1 creature within range wearing metal armor; Strength save. On failure, they are Restrained and moved up to 30 ft in any direction along the ground. On future turns while restrained, use Bonus Action to move them 30 ft. Save at end of each turn to escape.

Alomancy Infusion. If you have Metallic Step, spend 1 Ingot to cast this in reaction to an ally casting a jutsu/ability affecting an area as if Interrupt — creatures failing the save are moved up to 30 ft toward the ally's area. Duration becomes Instant.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If cast at B-Rank or higher, increase targets by 1. If cast at S-Rank, increase targets by 1.

jutsu.name: Steel Release: Steel Rain
jutsu.description:
Manifest numerous thrown weapons (Shuriken / Kunai) and unleash them on all targets within a 15-ft sphere. Creatures in range make a Dexterity save, taking [Weapon Damage] + 1d10 and 1 rank of Weakened on failure; half on success.

Alomancy Infusion. If you have Superheavy Metals or Metallic Fan, spend 1 Ingot to magnify weapon weight — creatures who fail are knocked Prone.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Steel Release: Steel Wall
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Earth Release, Stable, Barrier
jutsu.description:
Weave metallic chakra with earth release to conjure a wall of pure Steel. Wall appears in a space within range, growing in size — 2 ft thick, composed of ten 10×10 ft panels (must be contiguous). Alternatively, create a steel wall surrounding a 20-ft radius sphere.

Barrier has 4d8 + 10 HP and 20 AC. Spending an Ingot as part of Alomancy regains 2d8 HP. While the wall has HP, spend Bonus Action to erect spikes from one side — creatures within 10 ft of chosen side make Dex save, taking 5d6 piercing/slashing on failure, half on success.

Alomancy Infusion. If you have Metallic Thorns or Supersharp, spend 1 Ingot to serrate the wall. Creatures in the area when summoned, wall-running, or melee attacking the wall make a Dex save, gaining 2 ranks Bleed on failure.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and wall HP by 1d8 + 2.

jutsu.name: Steel Release: Steel Spear
jutsu.description:
Conjure a massive steel spear. Make a ranged Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack, dealing [Weapon Damage] + 5d8. On a crit, the spear splinters — triple damage dice instead of doubling.

Alomancy Infusion. If you have Steel Reinforcement or Supersharp, spend up to 2 Ingots to gain +1 crit threat range per Ingot.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Steel Release: Storm of Steel
jutsu.description:
Create a massive quantity of steel weapons above you in a 30-ft radius. Hostile creatures starting their turn or entering the area make a Dexterity save, suffering one of:
  • Bludgeoning — 5d6 bludgeoning + Dazed.
  • Piercing — 5d6 piercing + 1 rank Weakened.
  • Slashing — 5d6 slashing + 1 rank Bleed.

Alomancy Infusion. If you have Metallic Fan or Metallic Step, spend 1 Ingot to cause failing creatures to be skewered and pulled into a space of your choice within the area.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Steel Release: Steel Suit
jutsu.description: Wrap a thin metal sheet around a willing ally's body. For the duration, they gain 8d6 Temporary HP and 5 DR while having Temp HP. They count as an Earthen Artifact. Jutsu ends when Temp HP reaches 0.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and Temp HP by 1d6. If cast at S-Rank, the die becomes d10.

jutsu.name: Steel Release: Binding Metal Chains
jutsu.description:
Focus chakra underground, creating huge steel — dozens of chains launch from the surface to restrain those you command. Each chosen creature in range makes a Dexterity save. On failure, take 6d8 damage and Restrained.

For the remainder, creatures entering range or starting their turn in range while not restrained may be forced to save again (your choice) or become restrained and take 6d8 damage. Restrained creatures save at end of each turn to escape. Affected area is difficult terrain.

Alomancy Infusion. If you have Iron Bulwark, Steel Reinforcement or Superheavy Metals, spend 2 Ingots — creatures who passed their save remake them.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3, radius by 10 ft, and damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Steel Release: Metal Prison
jutsu.description:
Constrict and bind a creature with metal. Target makes a Strength save, being Restrained by the metal prison encircling them in chakra-retardant metals. Failed save → trapped, total cover vs all creatures outside.

Prison is a 10-ft cube with bars < 1 inch apart. Captured creature treats everything outside as heavily obscured. Area-effect attacks targeting both intercept on the prison.

Internal walls: AC 20, 100 HP, 20 DR vs damage from inside. External walls: AC 10, 50 HP, 10 DR vs damage from outside. If either is reduced to 0, jutsu ends.

jutsu.name: Scorch Release: Scorching Murder
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Wind Release, Fire Release
jutsu.description:
Create motes of superheated flame circling you, then fire like missiles. Make a ranged Ninjutsu attack, dealing 4d6 fire damage and forcing a Con save, gaining 1 rank of Burned on failure.

Scorch. Spend 1 Scorch Charge — on hit, all creatures within 10 ft of target make a Dex save, taking the original damage on failure (half on success). A creature failing by 5+ also gains 1 rank Burned.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6. If cast at B-Rank or higher, increase targets by +1. If cast at S-Rank, increase targets by +1.

jutsu.name: Scorch Release: Murderous Flame
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Visual, Tactile), Wind Release, Fire Release, Clash
jutsu.description:
Conjure superheated chakra and fire a beam of white flame in a 30 × 5 ft line. Creatures make a Constitution save.

Critical Success: Half of 3d8 fire damage.
Success: Half damage and Dazzled until end of next turn.
Failure: 3d8 fire damage and Confused.
Critical Failure: Same as failure but 4d8 fire damage.

Scorch. Spend 2 Scorch Charges — range becomes 30-ft cone.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Scorch Release: Murderous Revitalization
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Medical, Wind Release, Fire Release
jutsu.description:
Conjure globes of superheated flame, overwhelming chakra a hostile left on an ally. Select one condition applied by a hostile, reducing its rank by 1.

Scorch. Spend 1 Scorch Charge — your chakra destroys foreign chakra around you. Range becomes Self (10-feet), affecting all creatures in range.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and ranks reduced by 1.

jutsu.name: Scorch Release: Slaughtering Flame
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Visual, Tactile), Wind Release, Fire Release
jutsu.description:
Throw a single globe of flame onto a point within range, which explodes in a 20-ft radius. Creatures in range make a Dexterity save.

Critical Success: Half of 2d12 fire damage.
Success: Half damage and Weakened until end of next turn.
Failure: 2d12 fire damage and Burned.
Critical Failure: Same as failure but also Weakened.

Scorch. Spend 2 Scorch Charges — application becomes a melee Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack dealing [Unarmed Damage] + this jutsu's damage on hit, forcing a Constitution save instead of Dex.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Scorch Release: Blazing Murder
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Wind Release, Fire Release
jutsu.description:
Compress superheated chakra into a basketball-sized sphere, launch it, expand it into a cage of flame, then collapse it. Select a space within range; cage forms in a 15-ft cube, collapses; creatures in area make a Dexterity save, taking 4d8 fire damage and gaining 1 rank of Burned on failure.

Scorch. Spend 2 Scorch Charges — solidify the chakra; creatures who failed are Restrained by the flaming cage. Duration becomes Concentration up to 1 minute. Restrained creatures take 3d8 fire at the start of their turn. Strength save at start of each turn to end.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and cube by 5 ft.

jutsu.name: Scorch Release: Violent Slaughtering Flame
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Bukijutsu, Wind Release, Fire Release
jutsu.description:
Focus superheated flame onto your striking implement (hand, foot, head, weapon). Make a melee Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack:
  • Unarmed: [Unarmed Damage] + 5d6 fire.
  • Weapon: [Weapon Damage] + 4d8 fire.

On hit, target makes Con save — Immolated on failure.

Scorch. Spend 3 Scorch Charges — strike creates a shockwave in a 20-ft radius around the original target (excluding you). All creatures in radius make a Dex save, being Dazed and gaining 1 rank Burned on failure.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6 or 1d8 respectively.

jutsu.name: Scorch Release: Painful Violence
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Wind Release, Fire Release, Stable, Clash
jutsu.description:
Conjure globes of superheated flame, coat your arm, then extend into a flaming spear. Make a melee Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack comparing result against creatures in a 20×5 ft line from you. On hit, deal [Unarmed Damage] + 4d10 fire and force a Con save, Immolated on failure. Repeat as Action on subsequent turns.

Scorch. Spend any number of Scorch Charges — extend spear by +10 ft per charge. If a creature is within 5 ft when cast, roll an additional d20 vs only that creature, choosing either result.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Scorch Release: Hellfire Murder
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Wind Release, Fire Release, Clash
jutsu.description:
Slam the ground causing flames to sweep out from you in a 30-ft radius. All creatures excluding you in the radius make a Con save, taking 6d8 Fire and 2 ranks Immolated on failure, half on success.

Scorch. Spend 3 Scorch Charges — focus all hellfire onto a single creature in the radius; they make their save at disadvantage. If they fail by 5+, they instead gain 4 ranks of Immolated.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and radius by +10 ft.

jutsu.name: Scorch Release: Vengeful Mirage
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Visual, Tactile), Wind Release, Fire Release
jutsu.description:
Create a hazy aura of heat that disorients enemies. 20-ft radius of intense heat; creatures starting their turn in or entering the area make a Wisdom save.

Critical Success: Affected creatures resist this jutsu's effects.
Success: 1 rank Shaken and Dazzled until end of next turn.
Failure: 2 ranks Shaken and Dazzled.
Critical Failure: 3 ranks Shaken and Dazzled.

Scorch. Spend 4 Scorch Charges — select one Aura from Desiccated Heat even if you don't know it; this jutsu also has that aura's failure effects.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and radius by +10 ft.

jutsu.name: Scorch Release: Majestic Violent Murdering Hellfire Destroyer
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Wind Release, Fire Release, Clash
jutsu.description:
Conjure innumerable superheated flame globes, fusing them into a single massive sphere. Make a ranged Ninjutsu attack, dealing 8d12 Fire on hit. Hit or miss, all other creatures within 20 ft of the original target make a Constitution save, taking 4d12 Fire and 2 ranks of Immolation on failure.

Creatures reduced to 0 HP from this jutsu are turned to dust, leaving only an ash shadow.

Scorch. Spend 8 Scorch Charges — select up to 3 willing creatures within 30 ft to share their chakra. They select a known jutsu of B-Rank or lower that makes an attack as part of casting. They spend their reaction to cast it, infusing its effects into this jutsu. On a successful attack, each infused jutsu also applies their effects.

jutsu.name: Data Release: Antivirus
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Fuinjutsu, Lightning Release, Efficient, Stable
jutsu.description: Release a pulse of Data Release that causes a construct formed of neon light — the Neon Antivirus — to materialize and fight alongside you. Command as a Bonus Action.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If cast at B-Rank or higher, summon up to 2 Neon Antivirus. The second always uses the opposite Link effect.

jutsu.name: Data Release: Data Crash
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Visual, Tactile), Lightning Release
jutsu.description:
Manifest Data Release in your hands, molding into a weapon to throw and pin an enemy. Ranged Ninjutsu (or Genjutsu) attack vs creature within range, dealing 4d8 force damage and forcing a Strength save.

Success: Speed -10 ft until end of next turn.
Failure: Prone and Grappled. Save end of each turn to escape.
Critical Failure: Same as failure but Restrained for duration.

Angel Link: Range becomes 30 ft (10-ft radius); damage hits original target on hit; all creatures within 10 ft of target save vs effects.
Demon Link: Range becomes 5 ft. On hit + failed save, target becomes Firewalled until end of next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Data Release: Firewall
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you would take damage
jutsu.description:
Manifest a barrier of data release to protect you. Barrier has 2d10 + 8 HP, reduces triggering damage. For the remaining duration, the first time you take damage each turn, you can block 2d10 of incoming damage with the shield.

Angel Link: Trigger can also be when an ally within 30 ft takes damage; apply effect to ally + grant Signal Boosted.
Demon Link: When you reduce damage with the shield, also deal lightning damage to a creature within 30 ft equal to damage reduced.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and barrier/reduction by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Data Release: Torrent
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Visual, Tactile), Lightning Release, Clash
jutsu.description:
Outstretch your hand and launch prismatic particles of light. Creatures in range make a Constitution save.

Success: Half of 3d8 lightning damage and Shocked until end of next turn.
Failure: 3d8 lightning damage and 1 rank Shocked.
Critical Failure: 5d8 lightning damage, 1 rank Shocked, and Firewalled.

Angel Link: Allies in range suffer no harmful effects and gain 1d8 Temp Chakra + Signal Boosted until end of next turn.
Demon Link: Allies in range suffer no harmful effects and increase next damage they deal by 1d8.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d8. If cast at B-Rank or higher, increase Angel/Demon link effects by +1d8. At S-Rank, +1d8 more.

jutsu.name: Data Release: Jack-In
jutsu.description:
Generate a stream of Data Release into tech objects, taking control. All sufficiently technological items in range (computers, radio links, data scrolls, electronic doors) fall under this jutsu's effect while in the area. Make a Ninshou check vs DC 20 (GM may increase up to +10).

On success, gain telepathic control of these systems for 1 minute. Activate/deactivate, read content, communications. If connected to other systems (security, surveillance, doors), gain access to those too — can isolate or turn off for the duration.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3. At A-Rank, duration becomes 1 Hour and systems don't need to remain in the area. At S-Rank, duration becomes 24 hrs.

jutsu.name: Data Release: VPN
jutsu.description: Cover a willing creature within reach in a reservoir of Data Release chakra, generating an obscuring aura. For the duration, the creature does not produce sound and is Invisible (broken by attacking/casting/hostile action). Creatures can communicate with you and others under this jutsu's effect as if wearing a Radio Link.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and creatures affected by +1.

jutsu.name: Data Release: System Break
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Visual, Tactile), Lightning Release
jutsu.description:
Conjure a neon pillar of light and drop it on target. Dexterity save.

Success: Half of 5d6 lightning damage and Dazzled until end of next turn.
Failure: 5d6 lightning damage and roll 1d6 (1-2: Blinded, 3-4: Deafened, 5-6: both), until end of next turn.
Critical Failure: Same as failure but the condition lasts 1 minute (Con save end of each turn to end conditions from this jutsu).

Angel Link: +2 additional targets.
Demon Link: For duration of condition, once per turn, if an attack against them would hit, the data release detonates within, inflicting 1 rank Concussed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Data Release: Data Visualization
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Visual), Lightning Release, Sensory
jutsu.description:
Touch a willing or incapacitated creature and comb through memories for a specific event (creature must have experienced it firsthand). Unconscious creatures make Int save.

Success: Affected creature shares info within past day. Memory extracted; forget timeframe for 24 hours. Extracted memory becomes a data sphere you can experience for 24 hours — you + willing creatures within 15 ft can immerse and experience first-hand, able to move within it, pause, rewind or fast-forward.
Failure: Same as success but past week.
Critical Failure: Same as success but past month.

jutsu.name: Data Release: DDOS Attack
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Visual, Tactile), Lightning Release, Clash
jutsu.description:
Ultimate Genwa jutsu. Outstretch hands collecting Data Release energy, then release a destructive wave of neon light. All creatures in range make a Dexterity save.

Success: Half of 5d12 lightning damage and Shocked until end of next turn.
Failure: 5d12 lightning damage, Shocked + Firewalled + Blinded + Deafened for 1 minute. Roll 1d4 at end of turns (1: Con, 2: Int, 3: Wis, 4: Cha). On success, end one condition individually.
Critical Failure: 6d12 lightning damage with same conditions for 1 minute. You select the save stat each end of turn.

Angel Link: Cannot affect allies.
Demon Link: Failed creatures' concentrated jutsu are dispelled.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above A-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Great Water Arm
jutsu.description:
Quickly enlarge your main arm by moving water in your body. Melee Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack. On hit, deal [Weapon Damage] + 2d8 and force a Strength save, being pushed 15 ft and Dazed on failure.

Hydrofication: Range becomes Self (15-Foot Cone), comparing attack result vs AC of all creatures in range, applying effects on hit.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by +1d8. If cast at B-Rank or higher, failed creatures also become Bruised. If cast at S-Rank, also Staggered on failure.

jutsu.name: Tate Eboshi
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when an allied creature within range takes damage
jutsu.description:
Transform into a wave of water resembling a demon-like fish, acting as a barrier between an ally and the triggering effect. Move up to your speed, ending within 5 ft of your ally. Gain 2d8 + 8 Temporary HP and interpose damage the ally would take.

Hydrofication: Gains Clash keyword; if you reduce the incoming damage to 0 and the triggering creature is within 10 ft, they take 2d8 + 8 cold damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and Temp HP / damage by +1d8. If cast at B-Rank or higher, grow in size and interpose for all allies in a 15-ft cube.

jutsu.name: Water Spirit Wave
jutsu.description:
Point your hand at your target and mimic a gun shape, generating a ball of water at your fingertip that fires a burst stream of water bullets fast enough to tear through stone. All creatures in range make a Dexterity save, taking 4d6 cold damage and Bruised on failure, or half on success.

Hydrofication: Range becomes 30-ft long, 5-ft-wide line; creatures save at disadvantage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6. If cast at B-Rank or higher, failed creatures are Shaken. If cast at A-Rank or higher, increase cone/line size by +20 ft. If cast at S-Rank, failed creatures are Staggered.

jutsu.name: Misty Hallucination
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Genjutsu (Visual, Tactile), Water Release, Unaware
jutsu.description:
Infuse body with illusionary chakra, release a portion into a watery grenade that explodes spreading hallucinogenic mist. All creatures in the area make a Wisdom save.

Critical Success: Resist this jutsu's effects.
Success: 1 rank Dazzled.
Failure: If the affected creature spends its action to attack, it must target the closest creature with the first attack; then this effect ends.
Critical Failure: Same as failure, but must use first attack on closest creature for duration. Save at end of each turn ends.

Hydrofication: Your allies are immune to this jutsu's effects.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and range by +10 ft and radius by +5 ft.

jutsu.name: Rain Dance
jutsu.description:
Flurry of swings releasing water droplets, then turning weapon on foe. Melee Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack — [Weapon Damage] + 3d6 cold. On hit, all water returns like bullets. All creatures of your choice within 5 ft make a Dexterity save. On failure, 2 ranks Weakened from the bombardment.

Hydrofication: Compare attack result vs AC of all creatures of your choice within 5 ft. Failed save creatures are also Bruised.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6. If cast at A-Rank, increase ranks of Weakened by +1.

jutsu.name: Water Blob
jutsu.description:
Target makes a Dexterity save, having only their head submerged in a bubble of water (made from your body). While submerged, they are suffocating. Suffocating creatures must pay the original cost of a jutsu to maintain concentration on it. Takes 4d8 necrotic damage at end of each turn (cannot be reduced or ignored). Save end of each turn to end.

Hydrofication: Range becomes 30 feet.

jutsu.name: Steaming Danger: Tyranny
jutsu.description: From your liquid body, conjure a Steam Imp clone (cartoonish in design). Command as a Bonus Action. Uses your Ninjutsu attack bonus and Save DC. See creatures-bundle for full statblock.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3.

jutsu.name: Demonic Illusion: Steaming Mirage
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Genjutsu (Visual, Auditory, Inhale, Tactile), Water Release
jutsu.description:
Release a gout of steam collecting in an area. Select a point in range, force all creatures in a 20-ft radius to make a Wisdom save. Creatures ending their turn in the area remake.

Success: Confused.
Failure: Cannot discern friend from foe; perceive all creatures as the caster for duration. Save at end of turns to end.
Critical Failure: Same as failure but doesn't remake save at end of turns.

Hydrofication: You count as invisible to all creatures that fail their save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and radius by +10 ft.

jutsu.name: Water Balloon
jutsu.description:
Create a puddle of Water mixed with oil, producing bubbles. Launch at a point you can see within range, filling a 20-ft cube. Creatures of your choice entering or starting their turn within make a Dexterity save, taking 2d10 cold + 2d10 bludgeoning and being Staggered on failure, half on success.

As a Bonus Action on subsequent turns, select a new point within range, refilling and forcing saves.

Hydrofication: You count as invisible to all creatures that fail their save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d10 for each type.

jutsu.name: Demon Wave Sniper
jutsu.description:
Take your Water Pistol to its logical conclusion. Both hands, gun-shape, using moisture as targeting. Make a ranged Ninjutsu attack against up to 8 creatures in range, even if you cannot see them, once each. These attacks cannot be at disadvantage. On hit, deal 10d6 piercing + 5d6 cold damage.

Hydrofication: Attacks gain +2 crit threat range.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above A-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6 for each type.

jutsu.name: Dance of the Yuzu
jutsu.description:
Stab forward at an increasingly chaotic pace fast enough to create afterimages. Make two melee Taijutsu attacks dealing [Weapon Damage] or [Unarmed Damage] + 1d6 on hit. If at least one hits, target makes Strength save, knocked prone on failure and you move 10 ft.

Battle Lust: Spend 1 Battle Lust — attacks compared to AC of all creatures of your choice within weapon range.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6. If cast at B-Rank or higher, failed creatures pushed 10 ft. If cast at S-Rank, casting time becomes 1 Reaction (taken when a creature triggers your AoO).

jutsu.name: Dance of the Larch
jutsu.description:
Extract bones to a greater degree, sticking out in various positions creating makeshift armor. Gain 12 Temporary HP. If hit with a melee attack while having these HP, attacker takes 8 piercing damage that ignores DR.

Battle Lust: Spend 1 Battle Lust when target takes damage — Con save or gain Bleed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3, Temp HP by +8, piercing damage by +4.

jutsu.name: Dance of Bullet Seedlings
jutsu.description:
Outstretch a free hand and fire off finger bones like bullets. Select up to 3 creatures within range. Make a single ranged Taijutsu attack, comparing result to each creature's AC. On hit, deals 4d6 Piercing damage.

Battle Lust: Spend 1 Battle Lust — target a single creature instead and make attacks against same creature equal to (creatures you can target - 1), dealing 2d6 piercing per hit.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and number of creatures by +1.

jutsu.name: Dance of the Katsura
jutsu.description:
Strike with focus and grace. Make 2 melee Taijutsu attacks dealing [Weapon Damage] or [Unarmed Damage]. If at least one hits, Con save — failure inflicts a condition based on weapon damage type:
  • Bludgeoning: Bruised.
  • Piercing: +1 rank Weakened.
  • Slashing: +1 rank Bleeding.

Battle Lust: Spend 2 Battle Lust — force the creature to save twice, inflict any of the listed conditions on a failure regardless of damage type used.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Dance of the Willow
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage from a melee attack
jutsu.description:
Twirl, spin, and gracefully retaliate. Make a melee Taijutsu attack against triggering creature. On hit, [Weapon Damage] or [Unarmed Damage] + 3d8 and move up to 10 ft in any direction.

Battle Lust: Spend 1 Battle Lust — counts as an Opportunity Attack.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d8 per hit.

jutsu.name: Dance of the Setsugekka
jutsu.description:
Leave behind a small bone fragment inside a creature, then cause it to grow. As part of the same action used to cast another Kaguya Hijutsu that deals damage (or deal [Weapon/Unarmed Damage] with a Bone Weapon), cast this — Con save. On failure, leave the bone fragment.

Failed creature: 5d8 Piercing damage ignoring DR + cannot be resisted. For 1 min, at start of their turn, remake save — 3d8 Necrotic on failure, no damage on success. Action + Str (Medicine) check vs jutsu Save DC to remove (only one creature affected at a time).

Battle Lust: Spend 2 Battle Lust — failed save at start of turn also gains 1 rank Bleed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If cast at A-Rank, damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Ten-Finger Drilling Bullets
jutsu.description:
Clasp hands together pointing fingers, firing them all at once. Bone bullets like a shotgun burst in a 30-ft cone. Creatures in range make Dex save, taking 4d6 piercing damage and 2 ranks Bleeding on failure (half on success). Barriers treated as vulnerable.

Battle Lust: Spend 2 Battle Lust — range becomes Self (60-foot line). Failed creatures become Staggered.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Dance of Clematis: Stem, Thorn and Flower
jutsu.description:
Pour chakra across your skeleton, manifest two special bone weapons (proficient in both):

Clematis Vine. Special whip from your spinal cord. 1d8 Slashing, Reach 4, Trip, Finesse, Grapple. Flail weapon group. Once per turn on [Weapon Damage] hit, force Dex save → Restrained on failure. Strength save at end of turns to end.

Clematis Thorn. Drill-shaped bone over your arm starting at elbow. 4d6 Piercing, Critical 2, Deadly 4, Reach 1. Power weapon group. Cannot be disarmed. Attacks at disadvantage unless target is grappled (advantage). Cannot be used as part of jutsu that affects an area.

jutsu.name: Dance of the Seedling Fern
jutsu.description:
The perfected, final dance. Focus and empower bones, send them through the ground, expanding like trees in a forest. Fill a 45-ft radius centered on you with splintering bone towers branching into piercing ivory. Creatures in range (excluding you) make Dex save.

On failure: 10d8 piercing damage. If they had Temp HP or jutsu-granted DR, reduce those to 0 before damage. On success: half damage and no further effects.

The bone forest remains permanently. 10-15 ft tall pillars, occupy part of each space. Creatures moving through spend 2 ft per 1 ft. For 1 min, spend reaction to interpose damage from another creature in the area onto a bone pillar (pillars have 30 HP).

Battle Lust: Spend 3 Battle Lust on turn while in the area — select a space to teleport to. Creatures within 5 ft of teleport space suffer -2 to saves vs Hijutsu you cast before end of current turn.

jutsu.name: Test Cutting: Helmet Drop
jutsu.description:
Readied stance, downward swing fast and hard enough to kick up a shockwave. Melee Taijutsu attack against a creature in range. On hit, [Weapon Damage] + 2d12.

Ideal Cut: Target makes Con save, -2 AC until next turn.
Tao: Target makes Con save, -2 to next save before next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Test Cutting: Spring Garden
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, as part of rolling initiative
jutsu.description:
Dash forward as you draw your sword with intent to finish before it begins. Move into a space within your movement range, then make a melee Taijutsu attack. On hit, [Weapon Damage] + 4d6 and target makes Wisdom save.

Success: Dazzled.
Failure: Dazzled and loses Reaction until end of your next turn.
Critical Failure: Same as failure but also loses Action.

Ideal Cut: Roll 1d6. On 5-6, regain spent Reaction.
Tao: Roll 1d6. On 5-6, gain additional Bonus action on your first combat turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Test Cutting: Roaring Rain
jutsu.description:
Strike so fast your enemy doesn't have time to react. Select up to 3 creatures within your movement speed and make a melee Taijutsu attack, comparing result to each AC. On hit, [Weapon Damage].

If the target casts a Jutsu as a Reaction to the damage, its cost is increased by +4 due to strain. If their jutsu doesn't cost chakra, they must spend 12 chakra to take their reaction.

Ideal Cut: Increase damage by 1d6 for each creature targeted.
Tao: Force each creature to make a Con save, Severed on failure.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3, damage by 1d6, and extra reaction cost by +4.

jutsu.name: Test Cutting: Armor Splitter
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you would take damage from a creature within your weapons range
jutsu.description:
Counter-strike a creature in striking range. Make a melee Taijutsu attack against the triggering creature, dealing [Weapon Damage] + 2d6 and forcing Con save — Severed on failure.

Ideal Cut: Attack gains the effect of Empty Blade as if foregoing 2 attacks. Use the d6s rolled to determine if effects apply.
Tao: +1 crit threat range. If you crit, regain Reaction and immediately cast this jutsu again at no cost, ignoring its casting time, targeting the same creature.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Test Cutting: Harvest Grip
jutsu.description: Reverse grip on weapon. For duration, when rolling d6s to trigger Empty Blade's effect, reroll up to two dice, taking the second result.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If cast at B-Rank or higher, increase d6s rolled for Empty Blade by +1. If cast at A-Rank or higher, reroll up to four dice.

jutsu.name: Test Cutting: Autumn Shower
jutsu.description:
Brief striking stance, release force enough that all creatures before you become victims. All creatures in range make a Dexterity save, taking [Weapon Damage] + 2d8 and Shaken on failure (half on success).

Ideal Cut: Jutsu gains Empty Blade effect as if foregoing 2 attacks, but only against one affected creature. If both d6s trigger Empty Blade effect, the creature becomes Severed.
Tao: Range becomes Self (20-foot radius) and doesn't affect allies.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Test Cutting: Senta Piercing
jutsu.description:
Strike swiftly, becoming a living pincushion penetrating everything in front of you. All creatures in range make a Con save, taking [Weapon Damage] and Severed on failure.

Ideal Cut: Roll the Severed d6 twice, picking which to inflict. If already Severed, can inflict the rolled result in addition to current Severed effect instead of Shaken.
Tao: Drain laten Tao from failed creatures — gain Temp HP and CP equal to 1d6 per creature, lasting 1 minute.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Test Cutting: Demon Rain
jutsu.description:
Can only be cast directly after dealing damage with another Yamada Hijutsu. Using your Tao, all creatures damaged by the prerequisite cast make a Wisdom save — you conjure figments of yourself striking each. Once cast, cannot cast again until end of your next turn.

Success: Half of [Weapon Damage] + 2d12.
Failure: [Weapon Damage] + 2d12, Severed.
Critical Failure: Same as failure but cannot regain HP until end of your next turn.

Ideal Cut: Select one failed creature — gain Empty Blade effect as if foregoing 3 attacks against that target.
Tao: Select one failed creature — roll Severed d6 three times, apply each effect (no duplicates).
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Test Cutting: Two-Wheeled Moon
jutsu.description:
Gather Tao within, move fast enough to leave afterimages striking with your afterimage. Select a point within 60 ft. Single melee Taijutsu attack vs AC of all chosen creatures in the area. On hit, [Weapon Damage] + 3d10 and Con save → Staggered + Severed on failure.

Ideal Cut: One creature saves at disadvantage.
Tao: +2 crit threat range. If crit, gain Empty Blade effect (foregoing 2 attacks) against all creatures in range.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Test Cutting: Single Swing
jutsu.description:
Can only be cast targeting a Grappled, Prone AND Severed creature. Target the nape, prepare a single swift lethal swing. Melee Taijutsu attack dealing [Weapon Damage] + 10d6, rerolling 1s and 2s taking the second result.

Ideal Cut: For every 4, 5 or 6 rolled, target suffers -1 to AC and saves until next turn.
Tao: If attack is 10+ higher than target AC, automatic crit AND target suffers all 6 Severed effects.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Ice Release: Ice Daggers
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Bukijutsu, Water Release, Wind Release
jutsu.description:
Freeze water particles into daggers and throw them. Make a ranged Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack dealing 4d6 cold damage on hit.

If cast while occupying an Ice Mirror — on hit, target makes Con save, gaining 1 rank Frostbite on failure.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6. If cast at B-Rank or higher, increase Frostbite by +1. At S-Rank, +1 more.

jutsu.name: Ice Release: Ice Mirror Shield
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you or an allied creature within range would take damage
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Water Release, Wind Release, Barrier
jutsu.description:
Materialize a shield of Ice protecting target. Shield has 1d10 + 10 HP.

If cast while occupying an Ice Mirror, barrier can gain the DR, resistances, immunities and vulnerabilities of your Ice Mirrors.

If triggering damage doesn't destroy the shield, at start of your next turn it hardens into an ice structure for 1 min. This structure can be used as an Ice Mirror.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and shield HP by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Ice Release: Ice Prison
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Water Release, Wind Release
jutsu.description:
Release jagged Ice crystals that flash-freeze over a creature. Select one creature in range, Dex save — Restrained in a block of ice and 1 rank Frostbite on failure.

While Restrained: Deafened (otherwise sees normally), Strength save at end of each turn to break out.

The ice can be used as an Ice Mirror — 20 AC, 10 HP, resistance to damage originating from inside the trap. If reduced to 0 HP, jutsu ends and excess damage hits the encased creature.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and ice trap HP by +10.

jutsu.name: Ice Release: Needle Storm
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Bukijutsu, Water Release, Wind Release
jutsu.description:
Can only be cast while occupying an Ice Mirror. Dash out of your mirror in a straight line, forcing creatures passed through to make a Dexterity save, taking [Weapon Damage] + 1d8 cold on failure or half on success. End movement in a space adjacent to end of line.

If you cross an Ice Mirror's space, you can change direction (max 30 ft from new mirror, only once per casting).

A creature crossed multiple times only makes one save. +1d8 cold per time they were crossed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and initial damage by 1d8 cold.

jutsu.name: Ice Release: Certain-Kill Ice Spears
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Water Release, Wind Release
jutsu.description:
Slam palms on ground, instantly freezing air to create spears around you. Area becomes difficult terrain. Creatures in radius (excluding you) make Dex save, taking 3d10 cold and 1 rank Chilled + Frostbite on failure (half on success).

If you have active Ice Mirrors, this jutsu can originate from a Mirror you can see.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Ice Release: Frozen Capturing Field
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Water Release, Wind Release
jutsu.description:
Ground erupts outward covering 30-ft cube, freezing feet. Creatures in range make Dex save — speed -20 ft and 1 rank Frostbite on failure. Captured creatures can Strength save as Action on their turn to escape.

Area becomes ice-covered, difficult terrain. Creatures entering must make Dex save to avoid falling Prone.

If cast while occupying an Ice Mirror — select up to 3 spaces in range, conjure an Ice Mirror in each. At end of turn, dispel mirrors beyond your maintain limit.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and cube by +10 ft.

jutsu.name: Ice Release: Ten Thousand Ice Petals
