jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Water Release, Wind Release
jutsu.description:
Freeze water and air, launch innumerable ice daggers. Creatures in area make Dex save — 2 ranks Frostbite + speed 0 until end of next turn on failure, or half ranks on success.

Constructs/structures/objects failing gain vulnerability to next two damage instances they take before your next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and cone by +5 ft. If cast at A-Rank or higher, ranks of Frostbite become +2.

jutsu.name: Ice Release: Ice Needle
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Bukijutsu, Water Release, Wind Release, Efficient
jutsu.description:
Conjure water into the shape of any simple weapon. At start of each turn, choose form. Construct weapon has original weapon stats but deals cold damage. Attack action uses Ninjutsu/Taijutsu attack bonus and highest jutsu modifier instead of Str.

This weapon can be used as a Bukijutsu component.

If Attack action while occupying Ice Mirror, +1 attack.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If cast at B-Rank or higher and you Attack action without Extra Attack, Attack twice instead.

jutsu.name: Ice Release: Twin Dragon Whirlwind
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Water Release, Wind Release
jutsu.description:
Freeze air around you and swirl creating a localized ice storm. For duration, you cannot be targeted by ranged attacks or effects requiring line of sight. Once per turn, creatures entering the radius make a Constitution save. On failure, 2 ranks Frostbite.

Additionally, failed creatures within the radius are Blinded by winds and ice shards for the duration or until they leave.

jutsu.name: Ice Release: Fierce Tiger
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Water Release, Wind Release, Clash
jutsu.description:
Conjure a large Tiger of snow/ice that rushes the target. Water/Water Release jutsu between you and target instantly freeze, dispelling. If Clashes with a Water Release jutsu, that jutsu is immediately dispelled.

Submerged creatures or those benefiting from Self-Water Release jutsu make Dex save — 2 ranks Frostbite on failure.

Upon reaching target, tiger explodes — 15-ft radius around target, Dex save, 8d6 cold on failure (half on success).
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Ice Release: Demonic Blizzard Dragon
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Water Release, Wind Release, Clash
jutsu.description: Reach out as your chakra lashes out, creating a localized blizzard before splitting off and forming a crystal-white or sludge-black dragon. Summon one Demonic Blizzard Dragon (see creatures-bundle). Uses your Ninjutsu attack bonus + Save DC. Command as a Bonus Action.

jutsu.name: Explosion Release: Shielding Demolition
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Lightning Release, Earth Release, Barrier
jutsu.description:
Create a small explosion from your palm to deflect incoming damage, capable of bouncing ranged attacks back. Reduce the triggering damage by 4d6.

If the triggering damage was a ranged attack from a creature you can see, deflect some back. Make a ranged Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack targeting the attacker. On hit, deal 2d6 force damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3, the damage reduced and damage dealt by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Explosion Release: Clay Missiles
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Lightning Release, Earth Release
jutsu.description: Mold clay, earth, or another inorganic substance into three birds that soar towards a target, ignoring cover. Make a ranged Ninjutsu attack, dealing 3d10 force damage and forcing affected creatures to make a Strength save on a hit. On failure, knocked Prone and Dazzled.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and number of creatures by +1. If cast at B-Rank or higher, +1d10 damage. If cast at A-Rank or higher, can target same creature up to twice per casting.

jutsu.name: Explosion Release: Clay Spiders
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Lightning Release, Earth Release, Artistic Branch
jutsu.description: Mold clay/earth into a cluster of small spiders that scurry into a space within range. Uses your Ninjutsu attack bonus or Save DC. Command as Action or Bonus Action. Maintain up to 5 Clay Spiders (6th+ dispels oldest). See creatures-bundle for Clay Spider statblock.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and number of Spiders by +1.

jutsu.name: Explosion Release: Grenade Strike
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Lightning Release, Earth Release
jutsu.description:
Channel explosive chakra into one of your fists, swinging in a furious haymaker. Melee Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack against a creature or object. On hit, deal [Unarmed Damage] + 3d8 force damage.

Also, target makes a Constitution save — pushed 10 ft, Prone, Shaken on failure.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d8. If cast at A-Rank or higher, attacks increase to two.

jutsu.name: Explosion Release: Impact Landmine
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Lightning Release, Earth Release, Reckless Branch
jutsu.description: Channel explosive chakra into a striking limb, then strike the ground causing an explosion upturning the earth. All creatures (excluding you) in 10-ft radius around your space make Dex save. On failure, 3d6 force damage and 1 rank Dazzled, half on success. Affected area is difficult terrain until next turn for all creatures except you.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6. If cast at C-Rank or higher, failed creatures pushed 10 ft.

jutsu.name: Explosion Release: Soot Pile
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Inhale, Tactile), Lightning Release, Earth Release
jutsu.description:
Emit a large plume of toxic ash and soot from your palms, creating a lingering 15-ft cube of poison. Creatures in cloud when cast, entering for first time, or starting their turn in must make a Constitution save.

Critical Success: Resists effects.
Success: 2d6 poison and Dazzled until end of next turn.
Failure: 3d6 poison and 1 rank Envenomed.
Critical Failure: Same as failure + delirious, become Confused.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6. If cast at B-Rank or higher, increase cube by +5 ft. If cast at S-Rank, +5 more.

jutsu.name: Explosion Release: Blast Bomb
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Inhale, Tactile), Lightning Release, Earth Release
jutsu.description:
Mold clay into a sphere housing destruction. Select a point in range; throw it and it detonates forcing creatures in range to make a Dexterity save.

Critical Success: Resists effects.
Success: 3d6 force or poison damage.
Failure: 5d6 force or poison damage and Dazed.
Critical Failure: 7d6 force damage, Dazed and Staggered.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and number of points by +1. Creatures in multiple explosions only save once but suffer -1 per additional radius.

jutsu.name: Explosion Release: Clay Bird
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Lightning Release, Earth Release, Artistic Branch
jutsu.description: Mold clay/earth into a single bird that listens to your commands — Clay Bird (see creatures-bundle). One active at a time. Command as Action or Bonus Action.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If cast at A-Rank, summon a second Clay Bird.

jutsu.name: Explosion Release: Flight of the Tsurubebi
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Lightning Release, Earth Release, Stable, Reckless Branch
jutsu.description:
Build chakra in palms and soles, release in bursts to fly short distances. For duration, gain two special actions at start of each turn (can use both):

Explosive Dash. Gain fly speed equal to current speed until end of next turn.
Volatile Movement. First time you move or end movement (your choice), creatures within 5 ft make Dex save, taking 3d8 force on failure (half on success). Damage counts as casting a Hijutsu for Bakuton clan features.

jutsu.name: Explosion Release: Blast Corridor
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Lightning Release, Earth Release
jutsu.description: Slam your fists together focusing explosive energy, releasing it like a focused beam. All creatures in a 5-ft wide, 60-ft long line make Dex save, taking 3d12 force damage on failure (half on success). Barriers treat damage as vulnerable. Creatures with Temp HP reduce them to 0 before damage calc on failure.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d12. If cast at A-Rank or higher, range becomes 30-ft cone and Barrier-benefiting creatures save at disadvantage.

jutsu.name: Explosion Release: Absolute Death Bombing
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Inhale, Tactile), Lightning Release, Earth Release
jutsu.description:
Create a small volatile ball of chakra, hurled into the air toward a space within range. Detonates in a 30-ft radius. Creatures save vs Dex.

Critical Success: Resists effects.
Success: 3d6 force or poison damage.
Failure: 6d6 force or poison damage, Weakened.
Critical Failure: 9d6 force damage, Staggered.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Explosion Release: Clay Centipede
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Lightning Release, Earth Release, Fuinjutsu, Artistic Branch
jutsu.description: Mold clay/earth into two centipedes that listen to your commands — Clay Centipedes (see creatures-bundle). Up to 2 active at a time. Command as Action or Bonus Action.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3.

jutsu.name: Explosion Release: Chain Reaction Blitz
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Lightning Release, Earth Release, Reckless Branch
jutsu.description:
Throw chakra-laced grenades into the air, use them as guiding lights for your assault. Select creatures you can reach with your movement; throw a grenade at each. Dash between them, striking the grenades.

Make a melee Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack against each chosen creature, dealing [Unarmed Damage] + 4d10 and forcing creatures (excluding you) within 5 ft to make a Dex save, taking half result on failure / no damage on success.

If original targets fail, they don't take half damage but are Blinded, Deafened and Staggered until next turn. At jutsu's end, select a space adjacent to a hostile you attacked and move there (no AoO).
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3, damage by 1d10, and cone size by 5 ft.

jutsu.name: Explosion Release: Atomic Missile
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Lightning Release, Earth Release, Reckless Branch
jutsu.description: Propel yourself at a target within range using explosion release like a missile, rotating furiously like a bullet. All creatures/objects/structures in a 60-ft cone from you make Dex save, taking [Unarmed Damage] + 4d12 force damage and Staggered + Shaken on failure (half on success).
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above A-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Explosion Release: Clay Dragon
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Lightning Release, Earth Release, Artistic Branch, Stable
jutsu.description: Mold clay/earth into a Clay Dragon (see creatures-bundle) that listens to your commands. One active at a time. Command as Action or Bonus Action.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above A-Rank, increase the cost by 3.

jutsu.name: Boil Release: Skilled Mist
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Inhale, Tactile), Fire Release, Water Release, Corrosive Branch, Stable
jutsu.description:
Expel a corrosive cloud of mist from your mouth, lingering as acidic vapor. Creatures/objects/structures in range or beginning turn in area make a Dexterity save.

Critical Success: Half of 4d6 acid damage.
Success: Half of 4d6 acid damage and -1 AC until next turn.
Failure: 4d6 acid damage and Corroded.
Critical Failure: Same as failure plus 1 rank Deteriorate.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6. If cast at B-Rank or higher, area +20 ft. If cast at S-Rank, +20 more.

jutsu.name: Boil Release: Erupting Propulsion
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Fire Release, Water Release, Clash, Broil Branch
jutsu.description: Expel a powerful jet stream of mist that jets you forward to strike a creature with the force of a train. Select a space within movement range adjacent to a hostile, immediately move there. Make a melee Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack — [Unarmed Damage] + 3d8 on hit. On hit, target makes Con save → pushed 15 ft, Bruised on failure.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d8. If cast at B-Rank or higher, select an additional space; after first attack move to second and attack. If cast at S-Rank, third space too.

jutsu.name: Boil Release: Erupting Steam Wall
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Fire Release, Water Release, Stable, Barrier
jutsu.description: Swirl boiling chakra into your muscles, expel into a thin barrier. Gain 10 Temp HP when cast. Melee attackers take 5 acid damage. At start of each of your turns, regain Temp HP to 10 if below max.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3, Temp HP by +10 and damage by +5. If cast at B-Rank or higher, on taking damage from an attack, you can expel the steam outward in a shockwave affecting all creatures within 10 ft of you.

jutsu.name: Boil Release: Steam Bullet
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Inhale, Tactile), Fire Release, Water Release, Clash
jutsu.description:
Expel a powerful bullet of acid. Make a ranged Ninjutsu attack within range, dealing 4d8 acid damage on hit and forcing a Constitution save.

Success: Resists effects.
Failure: 1 rank Deteriorate or Scaled (your choice).
Critical Failure: Same as failure + Blinded from the steam.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d8. If cast at C-Rank or higher, +1 rank of Deteriorate or Scaled. If cast at B-Rank or higher, +1 target. If cast at A-Rank or higher, +1 rank. If cast at S-Rank, +1 target.

jutsu.name: Boil Release: Water Evaporation / Fire Extinguish
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when a creature would cast a jutsu that deals fire or cold damage or with the Fire or Water release keywords
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Fire Release, Water Release, Interrupt
jutsu.description: Counter a creature's fire or water jutsu by interrupting its casting. Make a contested check using Ninshou vs the target's Constitution save. On success, the target jutsu's casting fails and the target creature spends twice their jutsu's cost.

jutsu.name: Boil Release: Rusting Current
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Inhale, Tactile), Fire Release, Water Release
jutsu.description:
Create a current of steam expanding and firing forward like a train. All creatures in a 30-ft long, 5-ft wide line make a Dexterity save.

Critical Success: Half of 2d10 acid damage.
Success: Half of 2d10 acid damage. This damage ignores Temp HP and DR.
Failure: 2d10 acid damage and cannot gain bonus DR or Temp HP before next turn.
Critical Failure: Same as failure but 4d10 damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Boil Release: Hiding in Acid Rain
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Visual, Inhale, Tactile), Fire Release, Water Release, Corrosive Branch
jutsu.description:
Conjure a cloud of corrosive water particles in a 30-ft radius around you. Creatures inside and outside the cloud treat each other as lightly obscured. Cloud moves with you.

Creatures of your choice within the cloud beginning their turn that breathe make a Constitution save.

Critical Success: Half of 3d8 acid damage.
Success: Half of 3d8 acid damage and Dazed.
Failure: 3d8 acid damage and 1 rank Deteriorate or Scaled (your choice).
Critical Failure: Same as failure but 5d8 damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase damage by 1d8. If cast at A-Rank or higher, +10 ft cloud size.

jutsu.name: Boil Release: Steam Dash
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Fire Release, Water Release
jutsu.description:
Release powerful jets of steam from your body in a direction of your choice, propelling you. For 1 minute, gain +15 speed and can Dash as Bonus Action.

Also, when you Dash and attack at end of movement before end of same turn, attack at advantage and roll damage twice, taking higher.

jutsu.name: Boil Release: Corrosive Viper Fang
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Fire Release, Water Release, Broil Branch
jutsu.description:
Coil corrosive Boil Release around your arm forming a steam snake. Make two melee Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attacks, dealing [Unarmed Damage] + 2d8 Acid Damage. If target is Corroded, after damage calc, lose Corroded and gain ranks Scald = rank of Corroded (D 1 → S 5).

If both attacks target the same creature, gain +1 Pressure.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Boil Release: Touch of Dissolution
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Fire Release, Water Release
jutsu.description: Collect corrosive chakra into your hand to melt a surface. Select one surface you can see; melt through. If surface is 1 ft or thinner, dissolved leaving a 5-ft wide hole. Chakra-enhanced surfaces work only up to 6 inches.

jutsu.name: Boil Release: Acidic Dragon's Breath
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Fire Release, Water Release, Corrosive Branch, Clash
jutsu.description:
Fire a beam of corrosive steam in a straight line, melting and eroding everything. Creatures in 30-ft long, 5-ft wide line make a Dexterity save, taking 6d8 acid damage and 2 ranks of Deteriorate on failure (half on success).

If this would deal damage to a construct, structure or Barrier, treat damage as if vulnerable.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Boil Release: Scorpion's Stinger
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Fire Release, Water Release, Broil Branch, Clash
jutsu.description: Coat your body in compressed steam, shape into a Scorpion stinger. For duration, spend Bonus Action to make a melee Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack within range, dealing [Unarmed Damage] + 4d12 acid damage on hit. Target makes Con save → 3 ranks Scald on failure.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Boil Release: Strangling Vapors
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Fire Release, Water Release
jutsu.description: Release a globe of steam thick enough to choke. Select a point in range, 10-ft radius sphere. Breathing creatures starting their turn in the globe make Con save → 1 rank Exhaustion on failure. Bonus Action to move 30 ft within range.

jutsu.name: Boil Release: Acidic Apocalypse
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Visual, Inhale, Tactile), Fire Release, Water Release, Corrosive Branch
jutsu.description:
Release a massive flux of acidic steam for your body in 20-ft radius around you. All chosen creatures/objects/structures make Con save, taking 6d10 Acid damage and 2 ranks Deteriorate or Scald (your choice) on failure, half on success.

At start of each creature's turn beginning or entering the radius for the first time, make Con save → 3d10 acid + 1 rank Deteriorate or Scald (your choice) on failure.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above A-Rank, increase the cost by 3, initial and secondary damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Boil Release: Freight Train
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Fire Release, Water Release, Broil Branch, Stable
jutsu.description:
Vent every chamber of Boil release within your body. Become a Freight Train for duration:
  • Relentless Motion. Speed +30 ft.
  • Impact Engine. Once per turn, dealing [Unarmed/Weapon Damage] → Str save. On failure, Prone, Bruised, 1 rank Scald. On success, pushed 5 ft.
  • Unstoppable Force. Immunity to Prone, Slowed, Shaken, Grappled. Cannot be moved against your will; difficult terrain does not affect you.
  • Overheat. When this jutsu ends, you are Incapacitated until end of next turn.

jutsu.name: Lava Release: Lava Stream
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Earth Release, Fire Release
jutsu.description: Combine Fire and Earth Release Chakra before releasing a stream of lava in a cone. All creatures in range make a Dexterity save, taking 1d10 Fire and 1d10 Earth damage and Molten on failure or half on success.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d10 of each damage type. If cast at C-Rank or higher, +10 ft cone. If cast at B-Rank or higher, becomes 40-ft cube originating from you.

jutsu.name: Lava Release: Lava Rock
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Earth Release, Fire Release, Clash
jutsu.description: Conjure a mass of lava and launch at a target. Ranged Ninjutsu attack — 4d8 Fire damage on hit as magma splashes outward. All creatures within 5 ft of original target make Dex save → speed reduced by half on failure until next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d8. If cast at B-Rank or higher, failed save → speed 0 for duration.

jutsu.name: Lava Release: Quicklime Hardening
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Earth Release, Fire Release
jutsu.description:
Release a stream of molten matter that spills then solidifies. All creatures in range make Dex save → Grappled and Molten until next turn on failure.

If a Molten creature takes cold damage before end of their next turn, Str save → petrified until next turn on failure.

jutsu.name: Lava Release: Rubber Defense
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you or an allied creature in range would take damage
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Earth Release, Fire Release, Barrier
jutsu.description: Exude a protective rubber coating around yourself or a willing ally. Barrier has 15 HP and immunity to Lightning damage. Lasts until next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and Temp HP by 10.

jutsu.name: Lava Release: Steam Gas Vent
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Genjutsu (Inhale, Tactile), Earth Release, Fire Release
jutsu.description:
Select a point within a Molten Terrain you created; a fissure forms and releases noxious steam. All creatures in area make a Constitution save.

Critical Success: Resists effects.
Success: Dazzled until next turn.
Failure: 1 rank Dazzled and Dazed.
Critical Failure: Same as failure but Envenomed instead of Dazzled.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If cast at A-Rank or higher, +5 ft radius.

jutsu.name: Lava Release: Expanding Flame Rings
jutsu.components: HS, CM, W (any Shuriken or Chakram)
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Bukijutsu, Earth Release, Fire Release
jutsu.description:
Use Lava Release to augment a Shuriken/Chakram into glowing red metal. Throw with extreme force. Ranged Ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack — if Shuriken used, reduce ammunition die by 1 step. On hit: [Weapon Damage] + 3d10 Fire damage.

All creatures within 10 ft of original target make Dex save → Molten until next turn on failure.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Lava Release: Ash Stone Seal
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Fuinjutsu, Earth Release, Fire Release
jutsu.description:
Spew a thick cloud of volcanic ash that wraps around a creature. Force Strength (or Charisma) save, your choice. On failure, Restrained and Molten for duration. A creature restrained by this jutsu within a Molten Terrain auto-fails saves against the terrain's effects.

Save remade at end of each turn to end.

jutsu.name: Lava Release: Scorching Armored Fist
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Earth Release, Fire Release
jutsu.description: Use Lava Release to augment your entire body, launching a flurry of strikes. Make three melee Taijutsu (or Ninjutsu) attacks against a creature in range, dealing [Unarmed Damage] + 1d10 fire damage on hit. On miss, original target still takes 1d10 fire damage from the heat.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If cast at A-Rank or higher, +1 attack.

jutsu.name: Lava Release: Scorching Stream Rock
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Genjutsu (Visual, Tactile), Earth Release, Fire Release
jutsu.description:
Coat your hand in Lava Release Chakra, punch forward creating a super-heated shockwave. All creatures/structures/constructs in 60×5 ft line make Dex save. Creatures in Molten Terrain suffer -2 to save.

Critical Success: Half of 6d8 fire damage, no further effects.
Success: Half of 6d8 fire damage and -2 AC until next turn.
Failure: 6d8 fire damage, Molten until next turn, 1 rank Envenomed.
Critical Failure: Same as failure but 2 ranks Envenomed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Lava Release: Rubber Wall Enhancement
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Earth Release, Fire Release, Barrier
jutsu.description:
Slam hands onto ground, rubber erupts in front of you. Wall: 15 ft tall × 15 ft wide × 10 ft thick. Earthen Artifact with AC = your Ninjutsu save DC, 4d10+15 HP, resistance to piercing/slashing, immunity to bludgeoning.

If anchored to another structure (wall, tree), both gain 15 additional HP.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and Barrier HP by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Lava Release: Planet-Branding Blast
jutsu.keywords: Hijutsu, Ninjutsu, Earth Release, Fire Release
jutsu.description:
Punch the ground, conjure an eruption of lava and magma filling 45-ft cube. All creatures in range make a Dex save, taking 3d10 Fire and 3d10 Earth damage and Molten + Bruised on failure. Half on success.

Creatures in range repeat this save at start of each of your turns.

Affected area becomes Molten Terrain for duration.

If cast while in Lava Chakra Mode, can be cast as a Bonus Action.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above A-Rank, increase the cost by 3, damage by 1d10 each type, cube +5 ft.
